title: zigadenus venenosus var. gramineus
intro: Zigadenus venenosus var. gramineus, commonly known as death camas, is a toxic plant species that belongs to the lily family, Amaryllidaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of death camas are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve pain, and aid in the treatment of various infections. However, due to its toxicity, death camas should only be used under the guidance of a qualified herbalist, and herbal preparations typically involve decoctions or infusions made from the plant's roots, stems, or flowers.
